page_desc: Isevisi ye-imeyili yesikhashana yochwepheshe yokuvikela ubumfihlo bakho nokuvimba ogaxekile.
duplicate_email_error: Ikheli selivele likhona kulabhulali! Zama isiqalo se-imeyili ehlukile.
delete_confirm: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa leli bhokisi lokungenayo?
privacy_content:
• Asiyigcini imilayezo unomphela; asuswa ngokuzenzakalelayo.
  • Ngokusebenzisa isayithi, uyavumelana nokususwa okuzenzakalelayo kwedatha njalo ngemizuzu engama-20.
faq_content:
I-imeyili ihlala isikhathi esingakanani?

Umtapo wolwazi usulwa njalo ngemizuzu engama-20 ukuze kuqinisekiswe ubumfihlo.

Ingabe le nkonzo imahhala?

Yebo, inkonzo imahhala ngokuphelele.
privacy_policy_content:
• Asiyigcini imilayezo unomphela; asuswa ngokuzenzakalelayo.
  • Ngokusebenzisa isayithi, uyavumelana nokususwa okuzenzakalelayo kwedatha njalo ngemizuzu engama-20.
email_taken_error: Uxolo, leli gama liyasetshenziswa njengamanje, zama elinye
inbox_full_desc: Ufinyelele umkhawulo omkhulu. Sicela udale i-imeyili entsha.
expiry_warning: Isexwayiso: Le imeyili izocekelwa phansi ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemuva kwemizuzu engama-20!
